name: OPQ32r
description: Occupational Personality Questionnaire measures 32 personality characteristics relevant to work performance, covering thinking styles, relationships, and emotions.

description: Broad personality assessment measuring behavioral styles relevant to customer-facing, administrative, and entry-level roles.

description: Evaluates ability to apply rules and constraints to reach logical conclusions and solve abstract problems.

description: Measures accuracy and speed in checking detailed information, identifying discrepancies, and attention to detail.
